world_news.headline: US House votes to end government shutdown over immigration operations
world_news.summary: The vote provides funding for most Department of Homeland Security agencies, except for two subagencies responsible for immigration enforcement.

world_news.headline: How is Israel replicating its Gaza tactics in Lebanon?
world_news.summary: Widespread Israeli attacks on civilian targets in Lebanon are a repeated tactic from Gaza.

world_news.headline: Trumps says Iran can play at World Cup in US after FIFA confirmation
world_news.summary: FIFA chief Gianni Infantino has said Iran will play their World Cup matches, leading to agreement from US President.

world_news.headline: US-Venezuela direct flights resume after seven-year suspension
world_news.summary: The first direct US-Venezuela commercial flight in seven years departed Miami for Caracas on Thursday.

world_news.headline: Israel intercepts Gaza flotilla near Crete and detains 175 activists
world_news.summary: Pro-Palestinian activists say 22 boats carrying aid for Gaza were illegally intercepted in international waters near the Greek island.

world_news.headline: RSF condemns ‘kidnapping’ of three journalists on board Gaza aid flotilla
world_news.summary: Among the detained journalists are Al Jazeera correspondent Hafed Mribah and cameraman Mahmut Yavuz.

world_news.headline: Trump says US studying troop cuts in Germany, as spat with Merz intensifies
world_news.summary: His remarks come after the German chancellor criticised the US approach to the war in Iran.

world_news.headline: Deadly Israeli strikes on southern Lebanon despite ceasefire
world_news.summary: At least nine people - including two children - were killed, according to Lebanon's health ministry.

world_news.headline: US Congress passes bill to resume funding for DHS and end partial shutdown
world_news.summary: House approves funding measure, which excludes ICE, ending weeks-long crisis that left many federal workers without pay.

world_news.headline: Uganda court sentences man to death for killing four children at nursery
world_news.summary: Christopher Okello Onyum sentenced for fatal stabbing of four children aged between one and three years old.
